query:
SELECT 
  CASE 
    WHEN audioUrl LIKE '%d2xsxph8kpxj0f.cloudfront.net%' THEN 'sandbox_cdn_dead'
    WHEN audioUrl LIKE '%manus-storage%' THEN 'manus_storage_proxy_dead'
    WHEN audioUrl LIKE '%cloudfront.net%' THEN 'other_cloudfront'
    ELSE 'live_s3_or_other'
  END AS url_type,
  COUNT(*) AS track_count
FROM tracks
GROUP BY url_type
ORDER BY track_count DESC;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway05.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2NoQxNASu25QqFj.root --database frNnwU2pwLKJifDR8KqR7c --execute 
SELECT 
  CASE 
    WHEN audioUrl LIKE '%d2xsxph8kpxj0f.cloudfront.net%' THEN 'sandbox_cdn_dead'
    WHEN audioUrl LIKE '%manus-storage%' THEN 'manus_storage_proxy_dead'
    WHEN audioUrl LIKE '%cloudfront.net%' THEN 'other_cloudfront'
    ELSE 'live_s3_or_other'
  END AS url_type,
  COUNT(*) AS track_count
FROM tracks
GROUP BY url_type
ORDER BY track_count DESC;
